case_title: RISK MANAGEMENT ALTERNATIVES, INC. VS. SHEEHAN HOTEL INC et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RISK MANAGEMENT ALTERNATIVES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHEEHAN HOTEL INC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-04-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-20-2003
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF RISK MANAGEMENT ALTERNATIVES, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO BY MAIL ON JANUARY 17, 2003; AFFIDAVIT OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE ATTACHED408358 FILED BY PLAINTIFF RISK MANAGEMENT ALTERNATIVES, INC. SERVED JAN-16-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SHEEHAN HOTEL INC
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $154.80 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SHEEHAN HOTEL INC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RISK MANAGEMENT ALTERNATIVES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEEHAN HOTEL INC $2,847.19 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $154.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,661.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-04-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-14-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
